title: 關係副詞 where / when / why（形容詞子句）

formulas.formula: N + where + S + V... (其中 where = in/at which)
formulas.zh: 名詞 + where引導的關係子句（修飾地點名詞）

formulas.formula: N + when + S + V... (其中 when = in/on/at which) / N + why + S + V... (其中 why = for which)
formulas.zh: 名詞 + when/why引導的關係子句（修飾時間或原因名詞）

explanation: 此句型使用關係副詞 where、when、why 引導關係子句，修飾先行詞（地點、時間或原因名詞）。where 相當於『介系詞 + which』，修飾地點；when 相當於『時間介系詞 + which』，修飾時間點；why 相當於『for which』，修飾 reason。此句型避免了繁瑣的介系詞 + which 結構，使句子更簡潔。關係副詞在子句中不占語法位置，需注意先行詞的名詞性質（地點、時間或原因）來選擇適當的關係副詞。

examples.eng: The library where we study together is very quiet and comfortable.
examples.chi: 我們一起讀書的那家圖書館非常安靜舒適。

examples.eng: The morning when the accident happened, everyone was shocked and frightened.
examples.chi: 事故發生的那個上午，每個人都感到震驚和害怕。

examples.eng: The reason why he quit his job was that he wanted to pursue his dream.
examples.chi: 他辭職的原因是他想追求自己的夢想。

examples.eng: The restaurant where they had their first date is now closed permanently.
examples.chi: 他們初次約會的餐廳現在已經永久關閉了。

extension.tip: 判斷使用哪個關係副詞的關鍵：先看先行詞（名詞）的性質。若為地點名詞（place, location, room, school），用where；若為時間名詞（day, time, moment, year），用when；若先行詞是reason，一定用why。特別注意：不能同時用which和where/when/why混用。

examples.test: The school _____ he studied has a great reputation.
examples.result: → 填where（或in which）。school是地點名詞，先行詞修飾需用where

examples.test: The year _____ she was born was 2005.
examples.result: → 填when（或in which）。year是時間名詞，先行詞修飾需用when

examples.test: The reason _____ I left early is that I had an appointment.
examples.result: → 填why（或for which）。reason是原因名詞，只能用why不能用which

extension.note: 地點用where、時間用when、原因用why，三個關係副詞的先行詞詞性決定了該使用哪一個。

parts: they spent their first date is now a famous landmark in the city.
exercises.sentence: The café where they spent their first date is now a famous landmark in the city.
exercises.translation: 他們初次約會的那家咖啡館現在是城市裡著名的地標。

parts: we traveled abroad was the most unforgettable experience of my life.
exercises.sentence: The summer when we traveled abroad was the most unforgettable experience of my life.
exercises.translation: 我們去國外旅遊的那個夏天是我人生中最難忘的經驗。

parts: she studies English hard is that she wants to study abroad next year.
exercises.sentence: The reason why she studies English hard is that she wants to study abroad next year.
exercises.translation: 她努力學英文的原因是她想明年出國留學。

parts: our company moved to last month has excellent facilities and equipment.
exercises.sentence: The office building where our company moved to last month has excellent facilities and equipment.
exercises.translation: 我們公司上個月搬到的那棟辦公大樓設施和設備都很優秀。

vocab_table.zh: 關係副詞，修飾地點名詞（= in/at which）
關係副詞，修飾時間名詞（= in/on/at which）
關係副詞，修飾reason（= for which）

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係副詞填空，修飾地點名詞
mc_exercises.question_eng: The café _______ we had lunch yesterday serves delicious coffee and pastries.
mc_exercises.explanation: 空格前為 café（地點名詞），需用關係副詞 where（= in which）修飾。選項 B 的 when 修飾時間；C 的 which 為關係代名詞，在子句中需占位置，此處不符；D 的 that 不能用於關係副詞。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係副詞填空，修飾時間名詞
mc_exercises.question_eng: The day _______ she received the scholarship offer was the happiest moment of her life.
mc_exercises.explanation: 空格前為 day（時間名詞），需用關係副詞 when（= on which）修飾。選項 A 的 where 修飾地點；C 的 in which 雖意思接近但不夠簡潔，習慣上直接用 when；D 的 what 為疑問詞，用法不同。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係副詞填空，修飾原因名詞
mc_exercises.question_eng: The reason _______ he decided to study abroad was to pursue better educational opportunities.
mc_exercises.explanation: 空格前為 reason（原因名詞），需用關係副詞 why（= for which）修飾。選項 B 的 where 修飾地點；C 的 when 修飾時間；D 的 which 為關係代名詞，用於 reason 時應搭配 for 或改用 why。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係副詞填空，考察多個名詞的辨析
mc_exercises.question_eng: The moment _______ we arrived at the beach was unforgettable, and the beach _______ we played volleyball all day long was absolutely beautiful.
mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空的 moment 是時間名詞，用 when；第二空的 beach 是地點名詞，用 where。選項 B 交換錯誤；C 的 that 無法作關係副詞修飾地點；D 的 which 為代名詞，需在子句中占位置，此處應用關係副詞。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 圖書館是我喜歡讀書的地方。
translation_exercises.answer: The library is the place where I like to read books.
hints: 句型框架：N (地點) + where + S + V
注意：where 在子句中不占語法位置，子句需完整的主詞和動詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我永遠不會忘記我們第一次見面的那個下午。
translation_exercises.answer: I will never forget the afternoon when we first met.
hints: 句型框架：N (時間) + when + S + V
常見錯誤：混淆 when（時間） 和 where（地點），選擇時需看先行詞的性質

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他沒有參加聚會的理由就是他需要複習功課。
translation_exercises.answer: The reason why he didn't attend the party is that he needed to review his lessons.
hints: 句型框架：N (原因) + why + S + V
注意：reason why 是常用搭配，why 不能省略或改用其他詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 學生時代是我們學習最多知識、建立友誼的時期，我們應該珍惜。
translation_exercises.answer: The school days when we learn the most knowledge and build friendships are a period that we should cherish.
key_points: when 引導複雜關係子句
關係子句包含多個動詞（learn、build）
修飾複數時間名詞 days
hints: 句型框架：N (時間) + when + S + V1 and V2
提醒：先行詞若為複數（days），關係子句的動詞應相應調整；when 子句可包含多個並列動詞
